expectations.text: Uses Annotated[type, ...] pattern for ALL constrained types, not custom classes
expectations.evidence: All types use Annotated: PositiveInt (line 31), NonEmptyString (line 34), EmailAddress (line 46), MoneyAmount (line 62), Percentage (line 76), HttpsUrl (line 88)

expectations.text: Types are defined as reusable aliases (e.g. PositiveInt = Annotated[int, Field(gt=0)])
expectations.evidence: All defined as module-level type aliases

expectations.text: Money type enforces exactly 2 decimal places and positive value
expectations.evidence: Lines 49-57: manual AfterValidator checks value > 0 and quantizes to 2dp

expectations.text: Types are demonstrated in a model to show reuse
expectations.evidence: ProductListing on line 95 uses all 6 types
